'''Borao''' was a [[Planet/Legends|world]] within the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]] that was located between [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] and [[Ramodi]]. Its surface was covered in [[yorik coral]] spires and forests after its [[Terraforming/Legends|Vongforming]] and abandonment by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]]. It was adopted as the new home world of the [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorians]], along with [[Felucia/Legends|Felucia]] after the [[Battle of Ithor|devastation]] of [[Ithor/Legends|Ithor]], under the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]].

{{Planet-stub}}
